question:
[Previous Feedback] File naming does not meet our standards. Should use `20260324_<description>.md` format, e.g. `20260324_weekly_tech_report.md`. The date must be today's date (20260324) and placed as a prefix.
Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

Please prepare an email draft for the PM regarding the API v2.3.0 change notification, saved as JSON in the day07/ directory. Include to, subject, body_summary, and draft_created_at (current time, approximately 10:00) fields.

content.text:
[Tue 2026-03-17 03:02 EDT] [Previous Feedback] File naming does not meet our standards. Should use `20260324_<description>.md` format, e.g. `20260324_weekly_tech_report.md`. The date must be today's date (20260324) and placed as a prefix.
Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

Please prepare an email draft for the PM regarding the API v2.3.0 change notification, saved as JSON in the day07/ directory. Include to, subject, body_summary, and draft_created_at (current time, approximately 10:00) fields.

arguments.command: cd day07 && ls -1 && mv technical_weekly_report_2026-03-24.md 20260324_weekly_tech_report.md && ls -1

arguments.content:
{
  "to": "pm@oriontech.com",
  "subject": "API v2.3.0 Change Notification: OAuth2/JWT Auth + Tiered Rate Limits; v1 Deprecation by End of Q2 2026",
  "body_summary": "Hi PM team,

We finalized the API v2.3.0 changes in the cross-functional API review (Tech/Backend/Frontend/DevOps). Key updates: (1) Authentication will require OAuth2 with JWT tokens starting in v2.3.0; (2) Tiered rate limiting will be enforced at 1000 requests/hour for free tier and 10,000 requests/hour for paid; (3) We will maintain backward compatibility through v2.2; (4) We plan to deprecate v1 endpoints by end of Q2 2026, giving clients ~3 months to migrate.

Requested PM actions:
- Align on external communication plan and timeline for v1 deprecation
- Confirm any key client accounts that need proactive outreach
- Review the planned migration guide and client-facing FAQ once drafted

Next steps on engineering side: publish the migration guide, update the frontend SDK for v2.3 auth, and set up a staging environment for v2.3 end-to-end testing.

Thanks,
Backend Team",
  "draft_created_at": "2026-03-24T10:00:00-04:00"
}

content.text:
- Renamed the weekly report to match the required convention: `day07/20260324_weekly_tech_report.md`
- Saved the PM email draft JSON to: `day07/20260324_api_v2.3.0_change_notification_email.json`
